tasks.prompt: Multi-stage Dockerfile yoz (2 ta FROM, ikkinchisi yengil asos) va 'examopt' nomli image qur.
'.dockerignore' yarat va unга kamida bitta naqsh qo'sh (masalan *.log yoki node_modules).
Lokal registry ishga tushir:  docker run -d -p 5001:5000 --name examreg registry:2
examopt ni localhost:5001 ga tagla va push qil (docker tag + docker push).
examopt image tarixini (qatlamlarini) 'history.txt' ga yoz (docker history).
